jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at FabHotels
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
